label: Masons' Hearthroom
description: A compact residence built into Cindervale’s reused ashlar, its patched ancient blocks strapped with riveted iron bands that match the city’s later bastions. The main chamber is dominated by a soot-scored hearth and a narrow sleeping alcove screened by hanging canvas, with storage niches cut directly into the thick wall. A license-stone plaque is mortared beside the lintel, inscribed with toll marks and quarantine ordinances in the city’s standardized hand. Sound carries thinly through the masonry, and the air retains a persistent taint of coal-smoke and lime dust from the surrounding ruinfield works.
